reviews.review_description: This game is one I keep coming back to - and has the high score chase mentality. I also love the inclusion of Quest Achievements and the secrets for unlocking them!

Loop Runner is VR arcade novelty—a hypnotic, high-stakes challenge where your head becomes the ultimate controller. Navigate neon-soaked loops with pinpoint precision, dodging microbes and staying centered for maximum points. One wrong move, and it’s game over—but the electro beats keep you hooked, pushing you to beat your high score in quick, intense bursts.
This game is addictively fun, blending simple mechanics with razor-sharp reflexes in a stunning cyber-aesthetic. The originality shines—no controllers, just pure head-tracking mastery and rhythmic chaos. If you love fast-paced, brain-melting VR, Loop Runner is a must-try. Your neck will thank you… eventually. 🎵🔥

Loop runner is an addictive arcade game with a simple but addictive concept: fly through rings and avoid beeing hit - and the simpleness of the concept is really the big strength of the game 🙂 It is a nice goto game to play a few minutes and have some fun - and the Soundtrack is awsome
